action-pagequality-validate: U deji tayada bogga mid la xaqiijiyay
right-pagequality-validate: U deji tayada bogga inuu yahay mid la xaqiijiyay
action-pagequality-admin: Beddel calanka tayada bogga iyada oo aan xaddidnayn
right-pagequality-admin: Beddel calanka tayada bogga iyada oo aan xaddidnayn
prp-editinsequence-beta-label: Wax ka beddel si taxane ah
prp-editinsequence-beta-description: Isdhexgal cusub oo wax ka beddel ah oo kuu oggolaanaya inaad bogagga si degdeg ah u wax ka beddesho.
prp-editinsequence-http-error-pagelist: Liiska bogagga lama soo heli karin sababo la xiriira dhibaatooyin shabakad, fadlan isku day mar kale hadhow.
prp-editinsequence-pagination-does-not-e: Ma jiro qaybinta bogagga ee boggan, taasoo ka dhigaysa mid aan suurtagal ahayn in la ogaado bogagga xiga iyo hore. Haddii aad u malaynayso in tani khalad tahay, fadlan khaladkan ku soo sheeg phabricator.wikimedia.org.
prp-editinsequence-unknown-error: Khalad lama filaan ah ayaa la ogaaday. Fadlan khaladkan ku soo sheeg phabricator.wikimedia.org.
prp-editinsequence-http-error-page: Bogga lama soo heli karin sababo la xiriira dhibaatooyin shabakad, fadlan isku day mar kale hadhow.
prp-edit-in-sequence-preview-http-error: Horudhaca bogga lama soo bandhigi karin sababo la xiriira dhibaatooyin shabakad, fadlan isku day mar kale hadhow.
prp-edit-in-sequence-preview-api-error: Horudhaca bogga lama soo bandhigi karin sababta khaladka soo socda awgeed: $1 Haddii khaladkani uusan ahayn mid la filayay, fadlan ku soo sheeg phabricator.wikimedia.org.
prp-editinsequence-error: Khalad EditInSequence ah, lama sii wadi karo
prp-editinsequence-save-settings-dialog-: Kaydi xogta metadata si loogu isticmaalo isbeddellada dambe
prp-editinsequence-save-next-action-labe: Ka dib markaad gujiso badhanka "$1", samee tallaabadan
prp-editinsequence-unsaved-edit-message: Waxaad leedahay isbeddello aan la kaydin. Haddii aad ka baxdo boggan, isbeddelladaada waa la soo celin doonaa marka aad soo laabato.
prp-editinsequence-show-dialog-toggle-la: Muuji daaqaddan mar kasta oo badhanka "$1" la gujiyo
prp-editinsequence-could-not-save-edit: Wax ka beddelkan lama kaydin karo
proofreadpage-openseadragon-no-image-fou: Lama guulaysan in la bilaabo OpenSeadragon, sawir lama helin.
proofreadpage-pagelist-dialog-unsaved-pr: Ka bixidda daaqaddan waxay keeni kartaa lumis horumar aan la kaydin.
proofreadpage-pagelist-parsing-error-emp: Nooca tirinta bogagga ee 'bannaan' laguma taageero aaladda Pagelist Widget.
proofreadpage-pagelist-parsing-error-mor: In ka badan hal <pagelist /> calaamad ayaa laga helay wikitext-ka isha.
proofreadpage-pagelist-parsing-error-pag: Ma jiraan calaamado <pagelist /> ah oo la helay.
proofreadpage-pagelist-parsing-error-php: Khaladka soo socda ayaa la kulmay intii la falanqaynayay calaamadda pagelist ee dhinaca adeegga, $1
proofreadpage-pagelist-parsing-error-unk: Khalad lama filaan ah ayaa la ogaaday. Fadlan khaladkan ku soo sheeg phabricator.wikimedia.org adigoo la socda diiwaannada console-ka.
proofreadpage-pagelist-parsing-error-net: Liiska bogagga lama soo heli karin sababo la xiriira dhibaatooyin shabakad, fadlan isku day mar kale
proofreadpage-pagelist-dialog-title: Wax ka beddelka liiska bogagga ee $1
proofreadpage-pagelist-imageurlnotfound: Ilaha sawirka yar ee sawir-qaadistan lama helin.
proofreadpage-pagelist-assignedpagenumbe: Boggan waxaa loo qoondeeyay lambarka bogga: $1
proofreadpage-pagelist-dialog-visual-num: Nooca lambarku ma oggola in isbeddel lagu sameeyo tirinta. Qiime kasta oo ku jira goobtan waa la iska indha tiri doonaa marka la cusboonaysiinayo.
proofreadpage-pagelist-dialog-visual-sin: Beddel lambarka bogga ee boggan kaliya
proofreadpage-pagelist-dialog-visual-for: Dejinta lambarka bogga laga bilaabo lambarka sawir-qaadista $1 iyo wixii ka dambeeya
Dejinta lambarka bogga ee lambarka sawir-qaadista $1
proofreadpage-pagelist-dialog-visual-con: Liis ka kooban calaamadaha lambarrada bogagga ee si caadi ah loo isticmaalo ayaa loo baahan yahay. Fadlan la xiriir maamulayaasha isdhexgalka ee deegaankaaga si loo dejiyo calaamadaha.
proofreadpage-preferences-animation-time: Waqtiga sawir-gacmeed pan iyo zoom (inta u dhexeysa 0 iyo 2 ilbiriqsi, caadi: 0). Qiimaha sare wuxuu ka dhigaa mid siman, kan hoose wuxuu ka dhigaa mid degdeg ah
proofreadpage-preferences-showheaders-la: Muuji goobaha madax iyo hoose marka wax laga beddelayo meel magac {{ns:page}}
proofreadpage-preferences-horizontal-lay: Isticmaal qaab jiif ah marka wax laga beddelayo meel magac {{ns:page}}
proofreadpage-preferences-zoom-factor-la: Qiyaasta soo dhawaynta marka la duubayo (inta u dhexeysa 1 iyo 2, caadi: 1.2). Qiimaha sare wuxuu keenaa soo dhawayn badan tallaabo kasta
proofreadpage-preferences-show-dialog-be: Muuji daaqadda kooban ee wax-ka-beddelka mar kasta oo {{GENDER:|aad}} kaydiso bog habka EditInSequence
proofreadpage-preferences-after-save-act: Samee tallaabadan kadib marka aad kaydiso bog adigoo isticmaalaya habka EditInSequence
